global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with various geometric shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save and sign up with NovaPay.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NovaPay' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract geometric shapes, including circles and rectangles, in varying sizes and shades of blue.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional overlay shapes that complement the main subject, adding depth and interest to the design.

elements.label: Confidence message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Save with confidence' in a bold, clear font, centrally positioned for emphasis.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element, possibly a circle, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action button with the text 'Save with confidence Fast signup instant card' at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A small badge or banner at the top right corner that reads 'SALE' in a bright color, drawing attention.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label that reads 'UGC' in a simple font, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and minimalistic, NovaPay logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, main subject in the center, and CTAs at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, Fast signup, instant card, NovaPay, Shop now, SALE, UGC
